emails.subject: FW: CA for Green Mountain
emails.body: An NDA for EOL, this time it would protect the counterparty so we can receive copies of their financial statements. Forwarded by Tana Jones/HOU/ECT on 05/17/2001 09:18 AM Adriane Schultea/ENRON@enronXgate 05/15/2001 11:47 AM

emails.subject: FW: CA for Green Mountain
emails.body: An NDA for EOL, this time it would protect the counterparty so we can receive copies of their financial statements. Forwarded by Tana Jones/HOU/ECT on 05/17/2001 09:18 AM Adriane Schultea/ENRON@enronXgate 05/15/2001 11:47 AM

emails.subject: Re: FW: CA for Green Mountain
emails.body: Re: FW: CA for Green Mountain You might want to touch base with David Portz about Green Mountain with whom EPMI has a confidentiality agreement re EPMI's possible provision of a host of services. Since EOL will getting even more information to protect and Green Mountain has specifically asked that no New Power affiliate get any of their information it might be a good idea for EPMI and EOL each to know what the other is contemplating. Kay C. Young Legal Specialist Enron North America Corp. 713-853-6794 Phone 713-646-3393 Fax kay.young@enron.com Tana Jones 05/17/2001 09:19 AM
